name: leitnerbox
title: Leitner Box
description: This is a simple extension that use the concept of a learning process called leitner box
author: gzyannick

commands.name: create-a-question
commands.title: Create a Question
commands.subtitle: LeitnerBox
commands.description: Create a question for your leitner box

tools.name: create-flashcard
tools.title: Create Flashcard
tools.description: Create a new Leitner flashcard with a question and answer.

tools.name: list-flashcards
tools.title: List Flashcards
tools.description: List saved Leitner flashcards without changing review progress.

tools.name: list-due-flashcards
tools.title: List Due Flashcards
tools.description: List Leitner flashcards that are due for review today without updating boxes or review dates.

ai.instructions: Use Leitner Box tools to help users create flashcards and inspect their study queue. Do not claim that a review result has been recorded because these tools are read/create-only and never update card boxes or review dates.

evals.input: @leitnerbox Create a flashcard with the question 'What is the Leitner system?' and the answer 'A spaced repetition method that schedules flashcards at increasing intervals based on recall.'

flashcard.question: What is the Leitner system?
flashcard.answer: A spaced repetition method that schedules flashcards at increasing intervals based on recall.

evals.input: @leitnerbox Show me my saved Leitner flashcards, including the answers.

flashcards.question: What is spaced repetition?
flashcards.answer: A study technique that reviews material at increasing intervals.

evals.input: @leitnerbox Which flashcards are due for review today?
